title: The Assassin Eats Bread
overview: Transported with his class to another world, Akira quickly discovers that he far surpasses his classmates.

title: The Assassin Takes Care of the Wounded
overview: Akira is fighting his way through the Kantinen Labyrinth when he encounters an injured elf.

title: The Assassin Plays With a Cat
The Assassin Calls the Name
overview: The gang encounters Kilika, Amelia's sister, who holds a massive grudge against her.

title: The Assassin Sleeps In A Bed
overview: Akira and gang head to the land of beastfolk and face new encounters.

title: The Assassin Fights a Demon
overview: Amelia has been abducted, and Akira gets some unexpected aid in his quest to take her back.

title: The Assassin Makes a Vow
overview: Akira faces an unprecedented challenge as Mahiro, another demon, appears to take him on.

title: The Assassin Is Spellbound
overview: His determination renewed, Akira now gets to... watch a beauty pageant?

title: The Assassin Sees the Sights
overview: Akira separates from the hero's party to search for clues about Gram while wandering through a new city.

title: The Assassin Gazes at the River Surface
overview: Crow tells Akira things about Gram to convince him to kill him, but he remembers his family and hesitates.

title: The Assassin Browses
overview: Akira and the others investigate the Uruk City Adventurer's Guild to obtain information about Gram.

title: Oda Akira Becomes An Assassin
overview: After much deliberation and an unpleasant encounter with Gram at the guild, Akira decides what to do.
